title: Jungle Panorama With Shaders 2
description: A new Panorama in a modded Jungle with shaders. Based on a Vanillatweaks pack. (folder structure)
body:
A new and fresh menu panorama set in a Jungle with shaders. 
Created using a Vanillatweaks pack as the base. (vanillatweaks.net)
Screenshots were taken with the Panorama ScreenMake Mod. 
(https://modrinth.com/mod/panorama_screen)

Seed: 757816792670389652 with continents + terralith + qraftified + dungeons and taverns + katters structures + probably a lot more packs
